# exemplo-consentimento-biometria - Guia de Implementação FHIR R4 para Biometria Facial de Beneficiários v0.1.0

* [**Table of Contents**](toc.md)
* [**Artifacts Summary**](artifacts.md)
* **exemplo-consentimento-biometria**

## Example Consent: exemplo-consentimento-biometria

Perfil: [Consentimento para Biometria Facial](StructureDefinition-ConsentimentoBiometria.md)

## Participants

* **Role**: Patient
  * **Details**: [Maria da Silva(official) Female, DoB: 1990-04-15 ( https://saude.gov.br/fhir/sid/cns#898001160152321 (use: official, ))](Patient-exemplo-beneficiario.md)
* **Role**: Manager
  * **Details**: [Organization Operadora Saúde Exemplo S.A.](Organization-exemplo-operadora.md)

This consent is made under the regulation Consentimento concedido conforme LGPD Art. 11 - Dados Biométricos Sensíveis .

* [Rule](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): permit
  * [Time Period](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [What](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [Rule](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): permit
  * [Time Period](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): * Period: 2026-03-20 --> 2027-03-20

  * [What](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): * For action: Collect
* For action: Access and Use

* [Rule](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentação para este formato

    "text" : "Consentimento concedido conforme LGPD Art. 11 - Dados Biométricos Sensíveis"

  "provision" : {

    "period" : {

    "action" : [{

        "code" : "use",
        "display" : "Access and Use"

    }]
  }
}
